title: Control Inventory
description: Schema for the 30-control inventory covering AC, CM, PI, CF, IR, MN domains. Each control defines its statement, ownership, evidence requirements, risk linkage, and sampling parameters.

control_id.description: Unique control identifier in the format DOMAIN-NNN

domain.description: Control domain: AC=Access Control, CM=Change Management, PI=Processing Integrity, CF=Client Facing, IR=Incident Response, MN=Monitoring

control_statement.description: Full text of the control statement

purpose.description: Explanation of why this control exists and what risk it mitigates

owner_role.description: Primary role responsible for executing this control

backup_owner_role.description: Backup role when the primary owner is unavailable

frequency.description: How often this control is executed

system_components.description: Systems, tools, or infrastructure involved in this control

evidence_types.description: Types of evidence produced (e.g., screenshot, log, report, approval record)

evidence_path_convention.description: Template path where evidence is stored, e.g. artifacts/{tenantId}/AC-001/{period}/

population_definition.description: Definition of the population from which samples are drawn

sample_unit.description: Unit of sampling (e.g., transaction, change request, access review)

failure_criteria.description: Conditions under which a sampled item is considered a failure

last_reviewed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last review

approved_by.description: Person or role who approved the current version of this control
